raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "3. Warrig diwi koypd stat-
gacht/ ja tee vapreeksch ne faderr?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "4. Warr arridSan weens Lau-
wa Meschá ehkt/ kad winnam
Laupischanas newa? Arrig
weens jauns Lauwa fanvu
Balksni vazelt no fawas Allas/
fa ween kad tas ko irr guhftijs?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "5. Arrig weens Putnis ee-
kriht Walgá pee Semmes/ fur
Walga preeksch winna neiva?
Arrig tas Walgs tohp no Sem-
ntes uhszelts/ ar ko neneeka irr
guhftihts?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "6. Arrig ar Basunes tohv
kahdá Pilssfahtr basunehts/ fur
tee Landis ne Dreibbetu? Arrig
buhs kahds Launums Pilssfah-
tá/ ko tas KUNGS ne darra?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "7. Teefchain / tas Klungs
KUNGS ne darra nekahdu Lee-
tu/ fa ween kad wiꞥsch fanvu
Noslehpiumu fanveein Kalpeim
teem Praweefcheem irr parahdijs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "8. Tas Lauwa ruhz/ kas ne
gribbetu bihtees? Tas Klungs
KUNGS runna/ kas ne gribbe-
tu fluddinaht?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 9,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "9. Laischat to dsirdeht Asdo-
da staistos Nammos/ un aug-
stos Egiptes-Semnes Nam-
mós/ un fakkajt: Sapulzinaj-
tees us teem Kalneem no Sa-
marijas/ un rangajt tohs leelus
Trohfschnus winnas Widû/ un
tohs Nospaiditus winnas Wid-
û.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 10,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "10. Jo tee ne stuna dar-
las Teefa irr/ fakka tas KUN-
Tee fakrahj Mantas zaar V
ras-Darbu un Bohstischanu/
wós angstós Nammos.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 11,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "11. Tapehz ta fakka
Klungs KUNGS: Tas Een-
neeks (nahks / un apguls-
apkahrt wiffu Semmi/ un
nogahsihs to Stiprumu no-
wis/ un tawi skaisti Na-
taps tspohstiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "12. Ta fakka tas KUNG
Ra weens Gans diwi Leelu-
weenu Aufchu Gabbalu no
na Lauwa Riklies isglahbj-
taps tee Israëta Behrni isgl-
ti/ kas eeksch Samarijas dsh
fa no weenas Guitas Rakta-
kahdu Gutku Mallas.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "13. Klausajt un dohdeet
zibu eeksch Jehlaba Nam-
takka tas Klungs KUNGS/
Deews Zebaot.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "14. Jo tai Deená/ ka-
Israëta Pahrkahpfchanas
winnu veemekleschu/ tad tr
mekleschu es tohs Altarns-
Beteles / un ta Altara R-
taps nozirsti/ un frittihs
Semmes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "15. Un es fittischu tiklab-
Seemas-Nammu ka to Wa-
ras-Nammu/ un tee Nam-
Elewantu-Kanleem ces bo-
un dauds Nammt taps far-
tati/ fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
